name: Employee-canteen_wallet
label: Canteen Wallet
description: Link to the employee's canteen wallet for meal payments

name: Employee-enable_canteen_wallet
label: Enable Canteen Wallet
description: Enable canteen wallet access for this employee

name: Employee-wallet_credit_limit
label: Wallet Credit Limit
description: Credit limit for the employee's canteen wallet

name: Employee-dietary_preferences
label: Dietary Preferences
options:
Vegetarian
Non-Vegetarian
Vegan
Jain
No Preference
description: Employee's dietary preferences for canteen service

name: Canteen Order-kitchen_display
label: Show in Kitchen Display
description: Flag this order for the kitchen display screen

name: Canteen Order-estimated_ready_time
label: Estimated Ready Time
description: Estimated time when the order will be ready

name: Canteen Order-bill_print_count
label: Bill Print Count
description: Number of times the bill has been printed

name: Canteen Invoice-printed
label: Printed
description: Indicates if the invoice has been printed

name: User-canteen_role
label: Canteen Role
options:
Canteen Admin
Canteen Manager
Canteen Cashier
Canteen Staff
Canteen User
description: Assigned canteen role for this user
